content_body:
As a Life Coach, I seek out beautiful locations that will allow my clients to experience luxury as close to a 5-star resort as possible. Many of my clients wear many hats and are in dire need of a RECHARGE weekend. When I found this home online, I literally was blown away by the luxurious feel of the cabin. Upon arrival, the cabin was everything and MORE, and the pictures online don't even do it justice. It was such a relaxing and inviting atmosphere and it was everything I needed to coach my clients to a place of transformation.

The cabin was quiet, secluded, and the perfect location for a family vacation or a girl's getaway. The kitchen was fully stocked with everything we needed to make amazing meals. The only thing you need when you arrive at this cabin is food and the most comfortable clothes that exist in your closet. We were fortunate enough to get snowed in while we were there, so the views of the mountain were breathtaking. I booked the cabin for a weekend and my clients did not want to leave when it was time to check out! I have booked the cabin again for the last weekend in May, so this trip we will probably spend more time outside.

The ladies who handle the bookings for this cabin are awesome, especially Nicole! They provide great service and will answer and handle any questions or concerns. Oh, and I highly recommend you carve out some time to make the short drive to Mercier Orchards and get some amazing desserts! Those fried pies are highly addictive!!! Cadence will definitely remain on the destination list for the Kizzymat mountain retreats!
title: A Life Coach + An Amazing Cabin = A Transformational Weekend!
